author: bainbrid
body:
#### PR description:

  - enables energy regression for the bParking and run2_miniAOD_devel modifiers
  - enables a new electron ID (model 2020Nov28) for the bParking and run2_miniAOD_devel modifiers
  - selects PAT electrons based on:
    - bParking: an "open" configuration (i.e. no cuts)
    - run2_miniAOD_devel: pT > 1.0 GeV and ID score > -0.25 (90% eff, 10% mistag, +1% miniAOD footprint)

The default behaviour is modified for the following reasons: 
  - bParking: is intended for the UL re-RECO of the Bparking data sets
  - run2_miniAOD_devel: is intended for any future re-miniAOD of existing CMS data sets

This PR depends on https://github.com/cms-data/RecoEgamma-ElectronIdentification/pull/19

A brief overview of performance can be found [here](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1019415/contributions/4278490/)

A summary of the modifier logic provided by this PR can be found at [this](https://twiki.cern.ch/twiki/bin/view/Main/RobBainbridgeSandBox#Support_for_CMSSW_releases_and_d) TWiki (see middle column of the table).

**NEW**: This PR raises the minimum pT of input tracks considered by the ElectronSeed step from 0.5 to 1.0 GeV for the bParking era. This change has also been forward ported to the PR https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/33725. This change and it's motivation was presented recently to [XPOG](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1019415/contributions/4278490/attachments/2235130/3788280/210428_LowPtElectrons_XPOG.pdf), slides 8 and 9. Performance studies can be found [below](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/33589#issuecomment-840673517).

#### PR validation:

  - local checks performed for both the RECO and PAT steps, with various modifier configurations
  - the following was: 136.88811, 1325.518, 136.898

#### if this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR:

This PR is a back port of cms-sw/cmssw#32391
title: LowPtElectrons: final energy regression and ID (back port of 32391)
